query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "qwen-agentworld: language world models for general agents" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (language-conditioned world models for agent policy generalization) and domain (LLM-based agents interacting with environmental descriptions) as the user's question, even though it focuses on the specific "LED-WM" architecture rather than the "Qwen-AgentWorld" framework.
